channel.title: Meshy AI
channel.description: Meshy AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Meshy in ComfyUI: How to Use the Official Partner Node for AI 3D Generation - Blog
item.description: Meshy 6 is a native ComfyUI Partner Node for 3D generation. Text-to-3D, image-to-3D, and multi-view-to-3D, with no plugin install and no local GPU.

item.title: Inside Funkatron: How a Solo Dev Uses Meshy
item.description: Inside Funkatron: How a Solo Dev Uses Meshy

item.title: How to Make a Roblox Game in 2026 (6 Steps)
item.description: Learn how to make a Roblox game in 2026 — follow 6 steps from game idea and 3D assets to Lua scripting and publishing. A complete beginner
